description_long: This is a green, corrugated metal fence panel with a series of evenly spaced vertical ridges running along its length. The panel is relatively thin and flat, with a uniform height and a straight, flat top edge. The surface appears to be coated with a matte or semi-matte finish, giving it a muted, non-reflective appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, post caps, or gates integrated into the design. The fence is likely intended for use as a modular barrier in urban environments, such as around construction sites, industrial areas, or property boundaries. Its robust construction suggests durability and resistance to weathering.
description: A green, corrugated metal fence panel with vertical ridges and a flat top, designed for modular urban barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the green corrugated panel with vertical ridges.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence panel.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the same corrugated pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim edge of the panel.
